Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about our platform.

What is a website game curation platform?

A website game curation platform is a site that collects and organizes the best games available online to help users find resources for their specific needs, such as productivity, design, development, or marketing.

How are the games selected for curation?

The games are carefully selected based on their features, user reviews, popularity, and overall utility. Our team evaluates each game to ensure it meets quality standards and provides value.

Can I suggest a game to be added to the curation?

Yes, we encourage user suggestions! You can recommend games through our 'Suggest a game' form. Each submission is reviewed to ensure it aligns with our platform’s focus and quality criteria.

Are the games on your website free to use?

Our curated games include a mix of free, freemium, and paid options. Each game listing clearly mentions its pricing model to help you decide which fits your needs.

How do I know if a game is trustworthy?

We provide detailed descriptions, reviews, and ratings for each game. Additionally, games are vetted for reliability, security, and user feedback before being listed on our platform.

Do you provide tutorials or guides for the games?

Yes, for many games, we offer links to official documentation, video tutorials, and user guides to help you get started quickly and efficiently.

Can I leave reviews or feedback on the games listed?

Absolutely! We encourage users to leave reviews and feedback on game pages. This helps others make informed decisions and ensures we maintain a high-quality curation.

Are there categories to help me find games more easily?

Yes, games are categorized by purpose, such as design, development, marketing, or productivity. You can also use our search function to find specific games quickly.

Is there a cost to access the curated games on your website?

Accessing our curated game lists is completely free. However, individual games may have their own pricing models, which are indicated in their descriptions.

Can I share curated games with others?

Yes, each game page has sharing options that allow you to easily send links to your colleagues, friends, or team members.
